executives.name: Ricardo Ramos Rodríguez
executives.background: Mr. Ramos joined the Company in 1989. He has served as our Chief Executive Officer since January 1, 2019. Previously, he served as our Chief Financial Officer and as our Vice President of Corporate Development and Business Development. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

executives.name: Gerardo Illanes Gani
executives.background: Mr. Illanes joined the Company in 2006. He has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 1, 2019. Previously, he served as our Vice President of Finance and as our Finance Manager. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

executives.name: Carlos Díaz Castellón
executives.background: Mr. Díaz joined the Company in 1996. He has served as our Executive Vice President of Lithium since 2018. Previously, he served as our Vice President of Operations and as our Vice President of Logistics and Supply Chain. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

executives.name: Gonzalo Aguirre
executives.background: Mr. Aguirre joined the Company in 1994. He has served as our Executive Vice President of Iodine and Industrial Chemicals since 2018. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President of Iodine and Industrial Chemicals

executives.name: Pablo Altimiras
executives.background: Mr. Altimiras joined the Company in 2007. He has served as our Executive Vice President of Nitrates and Potassium since 2018. He is a Chilean citizen and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President of Nitrates and Potassium

board_of_directors.name: Gonzalo Guerrero Yamamoto
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Guerrero has been a director since 2016 and Chairman of the Board since 2022. He is a lawyer and holds a law degree from the Universidad de Chile and an MBA from the Universidad Adolfo Ibáñez.

board_of_directors.name: Patricio Contesse Fica
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Contesse Fica has been a director since 2013 and Vice Chairman of the Board since 2022. He is a lawyer and holds a law degree from the Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile.

board_of_directors.name: Hernán Büchi Buc
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Büchi has been a director since 2017. He is a civil engineer and holds a degree from the Universidad de Chile and an MBA from Columbia University. He served as Chile's Minister of Finance from 1985 to 1989.

board_of_directors.name: Ashley Ozols
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Ozols has been a director since 2022. He is a citizen of Australia and holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of New South Wales. He has extensive experience in the mining and finance sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Antonio Schneider Chaigneau
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Schneider has been a director since 2022. He is an economist and holds a degree from the Universidad de Chile. He has served on various boards of directors in Chile and abroad.

board_of_directors.name: Gina Ocqueteau Tacchini
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Ocqueteau has been a director since 2023. She is a nurse and holds a degree from the Universidad de Chile and an MBA from the Universidad Adolfo Ibáñez. She has experience in health management and corporate sustainability.

board_of_directors.name: Xu Tieying
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Xu has been a director since 2023. He is a citizen of the People's Republic of China and holds a degree in economics from the University of International Business and Economics in Beijing. He has extensive experience in the chemical industry.

board_of_directors.name: Antonio Gil Nievas
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gil Nievas has been a director since 2023. He is a citizen of Spain and holds a degree in industrial engineering from the Universidad Pontificia Comillas and an MBA from Harvard Business School. He has experience in global finance and investment.

sources.source_description: SEC Form 20-F Annual Report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
